channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Yohendrick Pinango Impresses in Early Major League Debut with Toronto Blue Jays
item.description: Yohendrick Pinango, a 24-year-old outfielder from Venezuela, recently made his long-awaited debut with the Toronto Blue Jays after being called up from Triple-A Buffalo due to an injury to Nathan Luke...

item.title: Three Army Officers Escape with Minor Injuries After Cheetah Helicopter Crash Near Leh
item.description: In a remarkable incident near Leh, three army personnel, including Major General Sachin Mehta, narrowly escaped serious injury after their Cheetah helicopter crashed in the Tangste region. The acciden...

item.title: Trump Signals Interest in Expanding US Presence in Greenland Amid Local Protests
item.description: President Donald Trump has once again raised the issue of Greenland, using social media to share an AI-generated image of himself towering over the Arctic island. This comes shortly after the US speci...

item.title: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith proposes discussion on constitutional amendments affecting Indigenous treaty rights
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has indicated her willingness to engage in discussions with other provincial leaders regarding potential amendments to the Canadian Constitution concerning Indigenous tr...

item.title: Springbok Women Introduce Six New Players Ahead of Africa Cup Campaign
item.description: The Springbok Women are set to defend their Rugby Africa Women’s Cup title this weekend in Nairobi, with the team integrating six uncapped players into the squad. Assistant coach Laurian Johannes-Haup...

item.title: Vice Ganda Celebrates Luis Manzano's Birthday on 'Minute To Win It'
item.description: ABS-CBN brings back a memorable throwback of one of the most entertaining birthday celebrations on Philippine television. In 2013, comedian and host Vice Ganda joined the popular game show 'Minute To ...

item.title: Opposition threatens budget boycott over Imran Khan’s medical treatment and rights
item.description: In Islamabad, Leader of the Opposition in the National Assembly, Mehmood Khan Achakzai, on Friday issued a strong warning to the government. He demanded that the authorities address the opposition’s k...

item.title: Agnieszka Holland's Biopic Brings Franz Kafka to Life with Depth and Atmosphere
item.description: Agnieszka Holland's latest biopic, 'Franz Becoming Kafka', delivers a rich, multi-layered portrait of the iconic 20th-century Czech writer. Idan Weiss stars as Kafka, navigating the pressures of a dom...

item.title: Omoyele Sowore Declares 2027 Presidential Ambition Under AAC
item.description: Human rights activist and former presidential candidate, Omoyele Sowore, don announce say e go contest for 2027 Nigerian presidential election under the African Action Congress (AAC) platform. Sowore ...

item.title: Cape Town monitors wastewater after poliovirus strains detected, no human cases reported
item.description: Cape Town health authorities have stepped up disease surveillance following the detection of two poliovirus strains in the city's wastewater, identified during routine monitoring by the National Insti...

item.title: Paul McCartney performs at the final Late Show with Stephen Colbert
item.description: On 21st May 2026, Paul McCartney marked the end of The Late Show with Stephen Colbert with a memorable performance of 'Hello, Goodbye', joining Colbert for a duet in the show’s closing moments. The ep...

item.title: Ron DeSantis Avoids Commenting on Trump's Anti-Weaponization Fund Amid Controversy
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis made headlines on May 22, 2026, when he appeared to avoid questions from reporters regarding President Donald Trump's $1.776 billion 'Anti-Weaponization Fund.' The fund o...

item.title: Harding-born Academic Achieves PhD After Persevering Through Setbacks
item.description: Dr Mziwendoda Madwe, a determined academic from Harding, has finally earned his PhD in Accounting at the Durban University of Technology (DUT) during the Autumn graduation ceremony. At 44, Dr Madwe's ...

item.title: SpaceX completes test flight of upgraded Starship with mock satellites
item.description: SpaceX has successfully carried out a test flight of its most advanced Starship to date, marking a major step in Elon Musk's vision for lunar and Mars missions. The latest model, Starship V3, lifted o...

item.title: Rajya Sabha Elections Scheduled for 24 Seats on 18th June with Several Senior Leaders Retiring
item.description: The Election Commission has announced that the Rajya Sabha elections for 24 seats will be held on 18th June 2026. Among those set to retire are senior Congress leader Mallikarjun Kharge and former Pri...

item.title: Three men perish in boating accident near Savary Island during clam fishing
item.description: Three men tragically lost their lives on Thursday evening following a boating accident off the coast of Savary Island, British Columbia. According to the Powell River RCMP, the incident occurred aroun...

item.title: Lupita Nyong’o Discusses Character Depth and Diversity in The Odyssey
item.description: Oscar-winning actress Lupita Nyong’o has publicly addressed the controversy surrounding her casting as Helen of Troy in Christopher Nolan’s adaptation of The Odyssey. In a recent interview with Elle, ...

item.title: Evacuations in Orange County as Chemical Tank Threatens Explosion
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, California, issued evacuation orders for approximately 40,000 residents after a chemical tank at a Garden Grove aerospace plant showed signs of critical failure. The tank...

item.title: GOP Strategist Advises Lawler to Reconsider Support for Trump Amid Political Concerns
item.description: Republican strategist Rina Shah has publicly warned Rep. Mike Lawler (R-NY) to reconsider his close association with former President Donald Trump, citing the political risks as the midterm elections ...

item.title: 40,000 Evacuated in Orange County Due to Malfunctioning Toxic Chemical Tank
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, California, ordered the evacuation of approximately 40,000 residents on Friday following a critical safety incident at the GKN Aerospace facility in Garden Grove. The eme...
